headline: Red Sox blast the Orioles while Alex Cora gets the axe
morning_brew: Everything is upside down at Fenway Park after the front office fired Alex Cora along with five members of his staff. A record of 10-17 was apparently the breaking point for the management. I hope everyone involved is doing okay, and we will let the league and the team handle the fallout. It is a massive move that signals a total shift in direction for this season.

The players actually responded with a massive 17-1 win over the Baltimore Orioles on Saturday night. Willson Contreras had a huge night with a home run and five runs batted in. Garrett Crochet was absolutely dominant on the mound, tossing six innings of scoreless ball with seven strikeouts. Seventeen hits in a single game is one way to tell the front office you are still fighting.

We also have the full draft class for the Patriots to talk about this morning. Caleb Lomu from Utah is the new big man on the offensive line after being taken at pick twenty-eight. The team added nine players in total, including defensive help with Gabe Jacas from Illinois and a new tight end in Eli Raridon from Notre Dame. Addressing the line was a huge need, so I love the focus on protecting the future of the franchise.

trend_watch.trend: Six scoreless innings with seven strikeouts in a blowout win.
trend_watch.dans_take: The guy is a total horse and exactly what this rotation needs right now.

trend_watch.trend: Two hits including a home run and five runs batted in.
trend_watch.dans_take: This is the kind of production we expected when he signed with the club.

trend_watch.trend: Pitched a perfect ninth inning to close out the game.
trend_watch.dans_take: Good to see the young arm get some clean work in a laugher.

news_digest.headline: Why Passan says Red Sox can still turn their season around
news_digest.dans_take: Jeff always has a pulse on the league, and I hope he is right about a turnaround.

news_digest.headline: What's next for Red Sox after Alex Cora?
news_digest.dans_take: It is a massive shakeup for the staff, and now we wait to see who takes the reins.

news_digest.headline: Patriots' NFL Draft Recap
news_digest.dans_take: Mike knows this team better than anyone, and his breakdown of the new kids is essential.
